---
title: "AIM ASEAN Presentation"
format: pptx
---

## AIM ASEAN – AI for MSME Advancement in ASEAN

- Empowering 100,000 MSMEs across Southeast Asia with AI skills and tools.

## Program Overview

- • 2‑year regional initiative
- • Hybrid delivery: online + in‑person workshops
- • 4 modules covering AI basics, adoption journey, responsible use, deployment framework

## Key Partners & Funding

- • ASEAN Foundation (lead)
- • AVPN, Google.org, Asian Development Bank (ADB)
- • Project Asia Data (Singapore edition)
- • Fully sponsored – free participation

## Impact & Outcomes

- • 100,000 MSMEs targeted
- • 720,000 workers impacted via AI Opportunity Fund Asia‑Pacific 2.0
- • Certification of completion for participants
